text.cn: 地鐵出站全是刷臉閘機。外國面孔連續識別失敗，身後隊伍越來越長……
text.en: Exit gates are all facial recognition. Your foreign face fails repeatedly. The queue behind you grows...

text.cn: 打開乘車碼小程序，用已綁定的支付方式過閘。
text.en: Open the transit QR mini-program and pass with your linked payment.

feedback.cn: 綠碼一閃而過。科技讓你感到被善待了一秒。
feedback.en: Green code flashes. For one second, tech feels kind.

text.cn: 用國內號給工作人員發短信驗證，走人工通道。
text.en: Verify via SMS with your local number and use the manual lane.

feedback.cn: 工作人員核驗護照後放行。你保住了面子，也失去了 48 分鐘。
feedback.en: Staff checks your passport and lets you through. Dignity preserved, 48 minutes gone.

text.cn: 乖乖排人工核驗長隊（無碼無號的命運）。
text.en: Join the long manual verification queue (the fate of the codeless).

feedback.cn: 空調很足，但時間與自尊一起被消磨。
feedback.en: The AC is strong. Your time and pride are not.

text.cn: 你離開閘機，深圳的無人便利店燈火通明——下一個挑戰已在等你。
text.en: Past the gate, unmanned stores glow — the next challenge is already waiting.

text.cn: 你終於出站。手機電量與精神值一起報警。
text.en: You finally exit. Battery and sanity both flash warnings.
